message:
fix(core): fix 2 failing workflow auth tests + clippy redundant closure

- Use PaneCapabilities::prompt() instead of default() in run_workflow so
  workflow SendText steps have alt_screen: Some(false), preventing the
  policy engine from requiring approval on unknown alt-screen state.
- Replace default_wezterm_handle() with mock_wezterm_handle() in test
  runner so tests don't need a real WezTerm binary.
- Add create_test_runner_with_panes() helper to pre-register pane IDs
  in MockWezterm for tests that exercise SendText.
- Fix clippy redundant_closure in and_then call.

12,920 lib tests pass, 0 clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
